description: Style NoteSuper soft vintage leather and a variety of hues to choose from, wallets from fossil are the way to go for a look that chic and versatile effortlessly. Spice up your outfit with these funky yet conventional wallets and get ready to be on top of your game!Product DetailsPink tri fold wallet that has a flap with a buttoned closure, two insert pockets, one card holder with an id card holder in the middle, two insert pockets on either sides three card holders on the left, six card holders on either sides of the flap, zipped back pocket and branding on a metallic badge with a keyhole detail on the frontMaterial and CareVintage leatherWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDimensions: 10cm x 15 cm
